steps.title: Identify the target expression
steps.content: The question asks for the value of the whole expression $3(x-8)$, so it is not necessary to solve for $x$ separately.

steps.title: Isolate the expression
steps.content: Subtract $21$ from both sides of the equation: $$ 56=21+3(x-8) $$ $$ 35=3(x-8) $$ The answer is C.
